name: ESP_ERR_ESP_TLS_BASE
comment: Starting number of ESP-TLS error codes

name: ESP_ERR_ESP_TLS_CANNOT_RESOLVE_HOSTNAME
comment: Error if hostname couldn't be resolved upon tls connection

name: ESP_ERR_ESP_TLS_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
comment: new connection in esp_tls_low_level_conn connection timeouted

name: ESP_ERR_ESP_TLS_SE_FAILED
comment: esp-tls use Secure Element returned failed

name: ESP_ERR_ESP_TLS_TCP_CLOSED_FIN
comment: esp-tls's TPC transport connection has benn closed (in a clean way)

name: ESP_ERR_MBEDTLS_CERT_PARTLY_OK
comment: mbedtls parse certificates was partly successful
